SEO.title: Zomaar Zomert · Free summer festival in Itterbeek
SEO.description: Three days of free summer festival on the field in Itterbeek. Friday and Saturday the line-up, Sunday paella and petanque. Last weekend of July.

openGraph.title: Zomaar Zomert · Free summer festival in Itterbeek
openGraph.description: Three days, one tent, no tickets. Friday and Saturday live music, Sunday paella and pétanque. Last weekend of July, on the field in Itterbeek.

intro.body: Three days of summer festival on the field in Itterbeek, the last weekend of July. Live music, cold beer and the whole neighbourhood under one tent. Free for everyone, no tickets or wristbands.

paella.title: Sunday paella
paella.body: Long tables, one giant pan, the neighbours as company. Sign-up required, spots fill fast every year.

petanque.title: Pétanque tournament
petanque.body: The yearly pétanque tournament, Sunday afternoon, on the field next to the tent. Free to enter, open to all.

partners.heading: 100% Free.
partners.body: Zomaar Zomert stays free thanks to a whole crew of local businesses, volunteers and sponsors who keep it that way. Want to help out next summer?
